title: adelobotrys monticola
intro: Adelobotrys monticola is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and is used in traditional medicine. It is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing relief from fever, pain, and infections. Adelobotrys monticola is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling the leaves and roots in water, and is also used to make herbal remedies such as tinctures and decoctions.
